name: Hange zöe
description:
Hey there! I’m currently working on a series of character bots and have completed three so far—with plans to possibly create a fourth.

Also, huge credit to the incredibly talented artist @dewborb_art on X

Also credits to ynsbrightorbs on wattpad!

She made the story ‘Circle’ which I have read a while ago and I decided to make a bot on it
